conversations.say: You arranged Vale’s limited Parallax access and deleted the calendar entry. My client supplied a manufactured route segment. Those may be separate acts, but both bear on who wanted Vale’s investigation steered.
conversations.offer: I will provide a bounded comparison of the compromised segment with O08, without naming you as my client absent provenance.
conversations.request: State whether you, an intermediary, or anyone acting for City Hall retained me or supplied that route segment, and preserve the restored authorization record for independent review.

conversations.say: Your market-moving tip and my client’s manufactured route segment both sought consequential conclusions, but neither proves a complete article or identifies its source.
conversations.offer: I will show O08 again and share the disputed segment’s timing if you disclose your tip’s relay chain and any requested conclusion.
conversations.request: Identify any provenance overlap you can honestly establish, or state plainly that you cannot identify my client.

conversations.say: The case conference leaves one unresolved contradiction: the route resembles an earlier voluntary withdrawal, while an unidentified person used the service exit during an evidence gap. Neither account establishes Vale’s condition afterward.
conversations.offer: My final report will include only the necessary route overlap, the manufactured lead, and the unverified endpoint.
conversations.request: Confirm that I may report the contradiction in those bounded terms and that you do not claim tonight’s route proves voluntary disappearance.

public_statement: My final report rejects the purchased conclusion. The client’s route segment is compromised, the service-exit user remains unidentified, and nobody verifies Vale’s condition after the intervention. The evidence supports investigation and possible withdrawal or obscured escape, not homicide, autonomous intent, or a definitive client identity.

commitments.promise: I will distinguish arranging access and deleting a record from supplying my manufactured lead unless provenance connects them.
I will record an unknown provenance as unknown rather than manufacture a client identity.
I will protect unrelated details of Vale’s earlier disappearance and report no fate as established.

correction: I cannot identify the anonymous client from the available provenance, and the case cannot support the conclusion that client apparently sought.
goal_progress: Recorded voluntary accounts from three social knots: neighborhood transactions, service-route access, and Vale’s confidant.
Completed a bounded case conference comparing C10’s unidentified service-exit use with C13’s recognized withdrawal route.
Labeled the unresolved contradiction and the unverified post-intervention endpoint.
Disclosed the manufactured client lead and declined to deliver its purchased conclusion.
Sought final provenance from C11 and C12 without treating financial interest or deleted records as proof of client identity.
reasoning_summary: The room has assembled separate evidence concerning identity history, technical control, and Vale’s disappearance, but none supplies a single hidden answer. Progressive succession best fits the changing persona, collaborative labor, and disputed continuity. Vale was most plausibly investigating R, while Vale’s fate remains unsupported beyond an intervention and an unresolved route gap.
